title: ATAH Provenance Map
description: ATAH Core Protocol object: the parallel `_provenance` map referenced from any object containing verifiable claims (spec/v0.8 Section 4.2). Keys are field paths within the parent object using dot notation for nested fields and bracket notation (`field[0]`) for arrays. Values describe per-field verification status, source, and freshness. Required for any ATAH-conformant implementation.

verification_status.description: How the field's value was established. Closed enum (spec/v0.8 Section 4.3).

source.description: Identifier of the verifying source — partner_id, verifier_id, the literals 'professional', 'atah-registry', or 'self', or a VC issuer DID.

as_of.description: When the field's value was last verified (RFC 3339 UTC).
